source_old_req: Assume that all telecommand packets received on the telecommand input port of the Telecommand_Processing component conform to the expected command frame format. Guarantee that within any processing cycle, the event signals Force_mode_to_NM and Force_mode_to_SM dispatched from the Telecommand_Processing component are mutually exclusive; specifically, both events must not be active simultaneously. Guarantee that all power status outputs of the Telecommand_Processing component (including power_status_FSS, power_status_CSS, power_status_SPS, power_status_ES, power_status_MGM, power_status_GYR, power_status_STR, power_status_GPS, power_status_TRU, power_status_RW, and power_status_MGT) are assigned definite Boolean or enumeration values upon parsing and dispatching, ensuring that downstream components receive well-defined states rather than undefined or dangling values.
natural_requirement: The Telecommand_Processing component shall execute according to the scheduling and timing constraints defined for Telecommand_Processing.impl. The implementation shall use the Aperiodic dispatch protocol and complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 100 us.

requirement_items.text: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall execute using the Aperiodic dispatch protocol.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Aperiodic.

requirement_items.text: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 100 us.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 100 us.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Aperiodic. The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_Time as 0 ms .. 100 us.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall execute using the Aperiodic dispatch protocol. The Telecommand_Processing.impl implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 100 us.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
